premium.description: Annual premium charged for the $10,000 one-year term insurance policy; used directly as one possible gain value and to compute the other.

policy_amount.description: Face value of the one-year term insurance policy; used together with the premium to compute the company's loss upon the customer's death ($290 − $10,000 = −$9,710).

probability_of_death.description: Probability that the customer dies during the next year (from actuarial tables); used to assign probabilities to the gain values (0.001 for death, 0.999 = 1 − 0.001 for survival).
